programmes.show_description: The Gold Timers gamble their last $6,000 and commission a magnetic drone survey. The Ferals face a killer snake, while Brad and Chris get expert advice. S7, Ep7
Croc Shock. As temperatures soar, the remaining survivalists try to hunt whilst being hunted themselves. They fend off a night attack of aggressive crocodiles. S5, Ep2
The Barehanded Killer. After self-banishing, Kate is hit by Africa's elements. Desperately hungry, Bulent gets a major score with his bare hands - will vegan Makani eat it? S5, Ep3
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Liberty Trust Building. The team take on an old bank in downtown Roanoke, Virginia. Later, they return to the shop to create a wedding present for Grayson's big day. S11, Ep10
Roanoke Fire Station 1. The team rescue items from a historic firehouse that is being transformed into a restaurant and brewery. Later, Mike and Tay visit a vintage shop. S11, Ep11
The Plague. With the ice season in high gear, flu hits the dredgers like a plague, threatening to knock everyone operation out. Plus, a mistake by father Steve could end his quest. S5, Ep19
Double Jeopardy. Halfway through ice season, desperation kicks in as teams bring in experimental equipment and infamous ex-employees to double production. Will the gambles pay off? S5, Ep20
The Gold Gypsies hunt for nuggets in ancient mine shafts and Greg discovers a rare meteorite. The Mahoneys chase for more gold using Ted's granddad's treasure map. S4, Ep7
The Anaconda's Lair. The infamous legend of a 60-foot snake brings Forrest and Jessica to Brazil. After exploring underground caves, they encounter a massive Anaconda. S1, Ep6
Proving Grounds. Across the Bering Sea unrewarding crab fishing amongst the fleet causes high tensions and low morale as empty pots whittle away profits and nerves among the men. S7, Ep2
Old Age And Treachery. Jake Harris gets a sink-or-swim lesson on driving the Cornelia Marie, and danger strikes the Wizard when a crew member gets caught in the line. S7, Ep3
Striking Gold. The team tracks down a unique marker, taking them to a maze-like location riddled with caves. The determination pays off as they start unearthing priceless artefacts. S2, Ep7
Lost Mexican City. Josh Gates searches Mexico for clues behind the mysterious rise and disappearance of Teotihuacan, a powerful civilization that predated the Aztecs in Mesoamerica. S2, Ep16
Incan King's Mummy. Josh Gates ventures into the mysterious cloud forests of Ecuador's remote central highlands in search of the all-powerful mummy of the last Inca king, Atahualpa. S2, Ep17
Quake Shattered. After a devastating earthquake, Marty saves the Hartleys' log cabin from crumbling to the ground. Meanwhile, Misty replaces a collapsed greenhouse. S3, Ep3
House Of 30,000 Tires. The Raneys arrive in Ohio to find a family struggling to survive in their home made of 30,000 tire bales. They must battle pests, flooding, and unstable walls. S3, Ep4
The Bushmen risk their lives digging where opal thieves removed the ceiling supports. Meanwhile, the Blacklighters switch to dangerous night mining. S5, Ep20
Start With A Bang. The Bushmen bring in an explosives expert to blast through the toughest rock in Grawin. A brand-new team brings cutting edge technology to the opal fields. S6, Ep1
Uncharted Territory. The crabs have vanished, starting a gruelling hunt to save the fleet's way of life, and Captain Sig resumes the helm after a major heart attack. S13, Ep1
Architect Approved. The crew tackles a build for an architect - complete with framing challenges, snowmobile chaos and a doghouse that just won't stay in the truck. S15, Ep5
Big Time Timberframe. Mark and the guys travel to Patrick, South Carolina to build a huge wedding pavilion, the biggest timber frame they've ever created. S15, Ep5
A gold drought puts huge pressure on Jacqui and Andrew's partnership. The Poseidon Crew face extreme weather as they hunt for gold on a remote mountain pass. S7, Ep8
No Calm After The Storm. A brutal windstorm punishes the survivalists. A row with Bulent leads Makani to risk going it alone. The team goes on a make or break hunt. S5, Ep4
Boiling Point. Makani pushes through the valley to find a new tribe. Ryan hatches a high-risk plan to get a kill. And the heat forces a survivalist to leave. S5, Ep5
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Roanoke Bell Tower And Sign. Recruited by a local church, the team remove a weakening bell tower. Later, Mike works with a customer to design a stunning checkout counter. S11, Ep12
Dublin Mill. The team remove a dated water turbine from the historic Belle-Hampton Farm. Later, Mike and Tay return to the shop to build a kitchen island cart. S11, Ep13
Backseat Diver. The season's nearly over and Zeke's experiment endangers his brother. The High Noon's water heater suffers a lethal malfunction and tempers boil at the Wild Ranger. S5, Ep21
Lady Luck. With nine days left, there's risk and reward at Nome. A double sluice and lack of divers sees Emily confront her deepest fear. Shawn Pomrenke finds the ultimate land sale. S5, Ep22
The Mahoneys look for gold in one of the world's most remote regions. Meanwhile, the Victorian Diggers may have stumbled across millions of dollars' worth of gold. S4, Ep8
Formosan Clouded Leopard. Forrest tracks clues and eyewitness accounts that suggest the Formosan Clouded Leopard, which was declared extinct only recently, could still be alive. S1, Ep1
Breaking Point. A storm is brewing as a serious injury forces a crewmember to his bunk after the crane breaks on the Kodiak, and the Seabrooke's greenhorn has a mental breakdown. S7, Ep4
A Wing And A Prayer. The crew nearby come to blows on the Northwestern, and a deckhand on the Wizard falls asleep at the wheel sending the boat hurtling toward nearby vessels. S7, Ep5
Waking the Curse. In the treacherous wilds of British Columbia, six prospectors pursue a cursed cache of gold worth billions. Will they find the fortune, or fall victim to the curse? S1, Ep1
Lost Spanish Fortune, Found! Josh Gates goes to the coast of Florida and Cuba in search of sunken treasure from a fleet of Spanish ships sunk in 1715. S2, Ep18
Plummer's Gold. Josh sets off to search for the lost fortune of a notorious Montana sheriff. During his investigation, Josh blows open a mine that's been sealed for over a century. S3, Ep1
Cobbers Nightmare. The Raneys continue their work on the tire bale homestead in Central Ohio. They provide fresh water, strengthen walls and jumpstart an indoor garden. S3, Ep5
Troubled Water. The Raneys help a couple with a toxic salt water well, making it impossible to maintain a food source. Matt builds a solar still to de-contaminate the water. S3, Ep6
Baptism By Fire. The Cheals take on their most dangerous dig ever. The Bushmen trial a rookie to operate their exploration drill, but it doesn't go as smoothly as they'd hoped. S6, Ep2
In Search Of Fuel. The Opal Whisperers work underground together for the first time on a legendary claim. The Mooka Boys are forced to work Leif's late father's abandoned mine. S6, Ep3
Seismic Shift. The fall season begins with uncertainty. A seismic shift in sea temperature sends the fleet searching for displaced crab - and fighting an unusually large first storm. S13, Ep2
Down In Flames. Toxic smoke engulfs the Saga, Sean struggles to save the family business on the Brenna A and Wild Bill fears he may lose Nick to a terminal illness. S13, Ep3
Aliens Of The Deep. Video captured by the U.S. Navy triggers Jess and Phil's investigation into mysterious, supersonic craft flying above the waters off California's Catalina Island. S2, Ep11
Origins Of Stonehenge. Archaeology expert and adventurer, Josh Gates, travels to Great Britain to explore the origins of the mystical monument of Stonehenge. S4, Ep2
